case_title: IN RE: GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION)

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 13, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 25, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Oct-25-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to November 13, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 25, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
